svg.text: VIPER algorithm; regulon from DoRothEA database
Viral load predicts ANDV fate commitment

Fig. 4 | Temporal single-cell transcriptomics reveals divergent infection trajectories. A, Experimental design (72 scRNA-seq samples). B, UMAP + CellRank2 fate trajectories. C, TF activity heatmap (VIPER). D, Viral load correlates with ANDV fate probability. E, IFN-ISG temporal decoupling — ISG induction precedes IFN production (cGAS-STING bypass hypothesis).
